hypothesis: Integrating a differentiable synthesizability predictor and an environmental-impact evaluator into MatAgent to jointly optimize formation energy per atom, synthesizability, and environmental footprint in the Planning and Proposition stages will yield a higher proportion of SMACT-valid, synthetically accessible compositions with formation energies closer to the target and a higher V.U.N. score than the current single-objective (formation energy only) approach across the MP-60 dataset.
